exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';

args.query:
SELECT "Index", AVG(("High" - "Low") / "Open") AS avg_intraday_volatility, COUNT(*) as days
FROM index_trade
WHERE Date >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY avg_intraday_volatility DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT "Index", AVG(("High" - "Low") / "Open") AS avg_intraday_volatility, COUNT(*) as days
FROM index_trade
WHERE Date >= '2020-01-01'
GROUP BY "Index"
ORDER BY avg_intraday_volatility DESC;

result.preview: "The SZSE Component Index (399001.SZ) has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility in the Asia region since 2020, with an average intraday volatility of approximately 0.02020 (i.e., ~2.02% of the opening price), based on available index trade data (2,719 days)."

args.answer: The SZSE Component Index (399001.SZ) has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility in the Asia region since 2020, with an average intraday volatility of approximately 0.02020 (i.e., ~2.02% of the opening price), based on available index trade data (2,719 days).

val_args.answer: The SZSE Component Index (399001.SZ) has exhibited the highest average intraday volatility in the Asia region since 2020, with an average intraday volatility of approximately 0.02020 (i.e., ~2.02% of the opening price), based on available index trade data (2,719 days).
